description_long: This is a rectangular, mid-rise apartment building with a flat roof and a brick exterior. The facade features regularly spaced windows with white frames and sills, and the front entrance is recessed with a small awning above it. The roof is equipped with several skylights or vents and a large HVAC unit, indicating modern amenities. The building has three visible stories, each with a consistent window arrangement, and the ground floor includes a main entrance with steps leading up to it. The side elevations show a repetitive pattern of windows, contributing to a sense of symmetry and order. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, early-to-mid 20th-century urban residential style, suitable for dense city neighborhoods.
description: A rectangular, three-story brick apartment building with a flat roof, white-trimmed windows, and a recessed main entrance. The structure features a regular window pattern and rooftop HVAC unit, reflecting a practical urban residential design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, symmetrical window arrangement, and brick facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long elevation with evenly spaced windows and the rooftop HVAC unit visible near the back.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain brick wall, fewer windows, and the HVAC unit on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the window arrangement of the other side, with the HVAC unit visible at the front corner of the roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in horizontal rows across each floor, with consistent spacing and alignment, creating a uniform and orderly appearance on all visible sides.
